name: Elasticsearch: Index Investigation Findings
description: Indexes alert investigation findings into Elasticsearch for tracking and correlation. Writes a structured document containing alert metadata, enrichment summaries, and disposition to a dedicated investigation index. Useful as a final workflow step to build a searchable investigation history. Enriches alert with elasticsearch_index_investigation_findings containing indexed status and document_id.
directive: You are a security operations analyst. Summarize investigation findings concisely for indexing into a SIEM investigation log.

data_samples.name: Alert with Enrichments

alert_context.summary: Outbound connection to known C2 IP
